ab: maki qutux qbsuyal mu mlikuy, Hayun lalu nya, mpux qutux kawas nya la.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Hayun，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Hayun, he is 11 years old.

ab: msqun cami mqwas qutux pqwasan biru.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.
Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: smoya cu lmngyaq, ryax hngawan lga, msqun cami musa lmngyaq qabax muyax myan.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: piyux qnbaq mu qayus na rangi, msqun cami mqwas qwas ru lmngyaq.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
